description: Release-layer label selection for the first expansion wave beyond v1. This extends the v1 core set with the previously shortlisted wave-2 fridge labels.
notes: This v2 release extends the v1 fridge-first core with the previously shortlisted wave-2 labels.
The selection still excludes pantry-heavy packaged grocery classes and labels missing from the discovery catalog.
Use the same pretrained MobileNetV2 baseline configuration first unless later experiments justify a different default.
